title: Betfair Information-Lag Books Scientific Collaboration 51
thesis: Cross external event signals, time-zone maintenance patterns, and book synchronization delays to find stale pricing. This variant fuses signal processing/neuroscience researcher guidance with microstructure researcher, bayesian/causal researcher to test multi-timescale filtering, burst detection, and low-latency state transitions; order-book stress, queue pressure, and execution-quality asymmetry; causal priors and uncertainty-aware edge filtering.
guardrails: No live promotion without human approval.
No credentials or hard caps may be mutated.
